text.title: Gemini API Integration — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `gemini-api`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: enable-streaming
step.action: If interactive UI → response.stream(); chunk-yield to caller.

step.name: add-tools
step.action: Register tools = [FunctionDeclaration(...)]; handle tool_call → tool_response loop.

step.name: wire-cache
step.action: If r3 triggers → create CachedContent; reuse cached_content arg.

step.name: wire-safety
step.action: Set safety_settings per harm category; record in client config.
